name: posthog
description: Analyze product data and manage experiments

interface.shortDescription: Analyze product data and manage experiments
interface.longDescription: PostHog gives your AI agent direct access to your product analytics, feature flags, experiments, error tracking, surveys, logs, and LLM analytics. Ask questions about your data, create insights, toggle feature flags, analyze errors, search docs, and more — all from chat.
defaultPrompt: Create a feature flag for the new checkout
